src/etl/loader.py:84 - [Critical] Unbounded warehouse query

The COPY INTO statement passes a user-supplied prefix straight into a SQL
literal without escaping. A malicious prefix could break out of the quoted
string and run arbitrary SQL with the warehouse's privileges.

**Suggestion:** Bind ``prefix`` as a parameter via Snowpark's
``session.sql(...).bind(...)`` instead of f-string interpolation.

=============

src/etl/transform.py:212 - [High] Cartesian join with downstream fact table

`fact_orders` is joined to `dim_customer` without an ON clause, producing a
cross join that explodes row count by ~1.4M× in production data.

**Suggestion:** Add ``ON fact_orders.customer_id = dim_customer.id`` (and
verify the join cardinality with ``EXPLAIN``).

=============

dags/refresh_orders.py:38 - [Medium] Missing retries on TASK creation

The task is created without ``RETRY_ON_FAIL`` so a transient warehouse
failure leaves the DAG in an inconsistent state.

**Suggestion:** Set ``allow_overlapping_execution=False`` and
``error_integration`` so failures are surfaced.
